tasks.label: build romp
tasks.command: g++ -g main.cpp video_player.cpp utils.cpp -o romp -I/usr/include $(pkg-config --cflags sdl3 sdl3-image sdl3-ttf liblo libavformat libavcodec libswscale libavutil libswresample) -pthread $(pkg-config --libs sdl3 sdl3-image sdl3-ttf liblo libavformat libavcodec libswscale libavutil libswresample)
